dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3603 IS: COLAs Don’t Count Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Welch (for himself, Mr. Sanders, Mr. Markey, Mr. Padilla, Mr. Heinrich, Mr. Wyden, and Mr. Schiff) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To amend the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 to improve the cost of living adjustment exclusion from income under the supplemental nutrition assistance program, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the COLAs Don’t Count Act of 2026.
Section 5(d) of the Food and Nutrition Act of 2008 (7 U.S.C. 2014(d)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (12), by striking July 1 and inserting January 1;
in paragraph (18), by striking and at the end;
by redesignating paragraph (19) as paragraph (20); and
by inserting after paragraph (18) the following:
supplementary payments of the type described in section 1616(a) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1382e(a)); and

section.text: This Act and the amendments made by this Act shall take effect on October 1, 2027.
